methods.description: Physiochemical identification and characterization of the recombinant construct using preparative HPLC and mass spectrometry, and secondary structure analysis by far UV light circular dichroism spectroscopy.

steps.description: Physiochemical identification and characterization of the recombinant construct was done by preparative HPLC and mass spectrometry.
steps.searchable_summary: perform HPLC and mass spectrometry for protein characterization

steps.description: Secondary structure by far UV light circular dichroism spectroscopy.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze protein secondary structure using circular dichroism spectroscopy

methods.description: Immunological characterization of the recombinant construct using immunoblot analysis with specific antibodies and sera from allergic patients and mice.

steps.description: Immunoblot analysis using a monoclonal mouse anti-Bet v 1 IgG antibody, sera from BP allergic patients, or mouse sera from a chimer-tolerized, poly-sensitized mouse.
steps.searchable_summary: perform immunoblot analysis with specific antibodies and sera
inputs: monoclonal mouse anti-Bet v 1 IgG antibody

steps.description: Detection using secondary rat anti-mouse IgG1 antibody followed by an alkaline phosphatase-conjugated goat anti-rat IgG, or alkaline phosphatase-conjugated mouse anti-human IgE antibodies and NBT/BCIP substrate mixture.
steps.searchable_summary: detect proteins using secondary antibodies and substrate mixture

steps.description: Negative controls with sera from untreated mice and non-allergic patients, or buffer control were run in parallel.
steps.searchable_summary: run negative controls with sera and buffer
